title: ConditionOutcome
description: Outcome of an individual condition within a compound decision.

condition_index.description: Index of this condition within the parent decision's condition list (left-to-right in source order).

value.description: The concrete truth value of this condition. Null if masked by short-circuit evaluation.

masked.description: True if this condition was not evaluated due to short-circuit semantics.

constraint.description: The symbolic constraint for this individual condition. For masked conditions, use Unknown with hint 'masked by short-circuit'.
